narrative:
Abdülkerim Bardakçı is a centre-back representing Turkey at the FIFA World Cup 2026. He holds an impressive overall rating of 7.25/10, placing him in the top 3% of centre-backs at this tournament. This rating reflects both his club form over the last two seasons and his contributions in the current World Cup.

Bardakçı demonstrates strong defensive capabilities, averaging 2.707 tackles per 90 minutes at this World Cup. His high volume of 6.09 clearances per 90 minutes highlights his commitment to denying opposition attacks. While contributing defensively, his offensive output is minimal, with expected goals per 90 minutes at 0.036 and expected assists at 0.056.

Bardakçı clearly serves as a crucial defensive anchor for Turkey, primarily focused on disrupting opposition play. His significant World Cup minutes, totaling 266, underscore his importance to the backline. Scouts and fans should continue to monitor his consistent tackling and clearance rates in upcoming matches, as these are vital to Turkey's defensive stability.
